{{/* Returns the promoted type ({name, description?}) from site.Data.apigroups.promotedTypes that applies to the current CRD and field path, or false. An entry matches when the current `kind` is in its `kinds` list (or it has no `kinds`, meaning any) AND the field's dotted `path` ends with its `matchSuffix`. Parameters: path (dotted field path), kind (current CRD kind) */}} {{ $match := false }} {{ $kind := .kind }} {{ $path := .path }} {{ range site.Data.apigroups.promotedTypes }} {{ $kindOK := or (not .kinds) (in .kinds $kind) }} {{ if and $kindOK (hasSuffix $path .matchSuffix) }}{{ $match = . }}{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ return $match }}
